caption: A man wearing a grey t-shirt, a grey and white baseball cap with a logo, and black over-ear headphones is seated in a recording studio. He is positioned in front of a large silver condenser microphone mounted on a black boom arm, which features the text "Bam larynx Podcast" on the arm. The background consists of dark, vertically ribbed acoustic sound-proofing panels. As the sequence progresses, the man is captured in mid-speech and laughter, shifting his head slightly and gesturing with his right arm. He begins with a wide, open-mouthed expression, transitioning into a broad smile with teeth showing as he continues to speak and laugh into the microphone. His right arm, which shows a tattoo on the bicep, moves slightly across the frame, while his facial expression becomes increasingly joyful.
